title: rosa amblyotis subsp. jacutica
intro: Rosa amblyotis subsp. jacutica, also known as the Altai rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the Altai Mountains of Russia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The Altai rose is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antiviral properties. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Rosa amblyotis subsp. jacutica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
